session_summary: Refresh account/positions (HD only, flat P&L), market rebound intact. HD/AMD monitored (stable/hot). Scans smallcaps/fin/energy: no standouts vs AMD catalyst. Diversification actionnée: BUY AMD 500 notional pour tech exposure complémentaire HD cyclical.
decision_report: Mémoire prev: HD entry confirmed (no lag issue), AMD no position. Tools first: positions/quote/snapshot/history/news. Comparé AMD>XLF/XLE/IWM (catalyst+outperf). Size prudente, <10% equity. Équilibre bootstrap: 2 positions diversifiées.
self_critique: Discipline tools/mémoire respectée (no assumptions). Diversification poussée sans chase (AMD>alternatifs). Comparaison 4+ options. Action vs inaction: valide cadence 500/run. HD fade noté mais no invalid.
pitfalls_to_avoid_next_run: Rechercher tickers spécifiques si ETF scans vagues.
next_session_directives: Monitor HD/AMD: P&L, intraday invalidations (HD<382, AMD<206).
Scanner energy/smallcaps refresh (e.g. XLE leaders, IWM top gainers tickers).
News: tariffs escalation, semis deals follow-up.
Comparer 4+ candidates, prioriser non-tech si possible.
open_questions: Handle vague news searches: tool chain spécifique tickers ?

long_memory_update_intent.why: 3 sessions: pattern petites entrées catalyst/diversifiées émerge, mais tester sur volatilité/P&L drawdowns avant update.

trading_decision.rationale: Portefeuille confirmé: HD seulement (qty 1.306, avg 382.91, P&L -0.20 flat, ~20% equity). Cash/equity 2500, BP 4500. Marché rebound (SPY+0.68%, QQQ+1.00%, IWM+1.16%, DIA+0.76%). HD stable post-earnings (intraday high 394->382.76>prev 377, no invalidation <389 open/376). Directives: monitor HD/AMD ok, scan smallcaps/financials/energy. News: tariffs/AI uncertainty mais rebound; AMD Meta deal confirme (+8.7% 213.76, vol 67M). Sectors: semis outperform (SMH+1.56%>IWM+1.16%>XLF+0.53%>XLE-0.29%). Smallcaps no specific leaders (searches vagues: no tickers outperform AMD/HD). Financials/energy lag (no catalysts). Diversification: HD cyclical -> AMD tech/semis catalyst frais > secteurs alternatifs. Entrée progressive 500 notional (~2.3 shares) ~10% equity, équilibre risque.
trading_decision.signal_principal: Meta AI chips deal +8.7% outperformance in rebound market.
trading_decision.risk_identified: Tariffs/AI jitters volatility, intraday low 206.5 (no break), over-reliance tech if semis fade.
trading_decision.invalidation_condition: Close below today low 206.5 or loss momentum <211 open.
